/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/qt6/lib CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/src/Bot.cpp.o -o tgbot  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib -lpthread
